title: Executive Order 12303—Presidential Advisory Committee on Federalism

flags.justification: A broadly composed committee (private citizens, state and local officials, federal legislative and executive members), purely advisory in function.
A purely advisory body with no compliance regime against third parties.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
Sec. 4(b) sets an explicit termination date: December 31, 1982, unless sooner extended.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
A purely advisory body with broad, independent membership including state and local officials.
A narrow, time-limited advisory function; no ongoing or expansive authority is claimed in the order's own text.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/12 = 0.0%. An early Reagan administration body associated with the 'New Federalism' policy initiative, cleanly bounded in its own text.
